description.ru: Live GitHub Releases и repository fallback для линий 3.1–3.3.
description.en: Live GitHub Releases and repository fallback for the 3.1–3.3 lines.

rows.ru: Windows Server packaged shared runtime fix
rows.en: Windows Server packaged shared runtime fix

rows.ru: Welcome recovery, Pulse catalog и UX
rows.en: Welcome recovery, Pulse catalog and UX

text.ru: Портал загружает GitHub Releases в runtime. При API failure используется fallback, сгенерированный из RELEASE_NOTES_*.md при Pages build; неподтверждённые assets не выдумываются.
text.en: The portal loads GitHub Releases at runtime. On API failure it uses a fallback generated from RELEASE_NOTES_*.md during the Pages build; unverified assets are never invented.

description.ru: SemVer source of truth и автоматические drift checks.
description.en: SemVer source of truth and automated drift checks.

text.ru: Корневой package.json является SemVer source of truth. CI сравнивает lockfile, Android metadata, Client handshake, README, Project Index, Architecture, Security Model и current release evidence.
text.en: The root package.json is the SemVer source of truth. CI compares lockfile, Android metadata, Client handshake, README, Project Index, Architecture, Security Model and current release evidence.

ru: Immutable tag и exact source revision.
SHA-256/checksum verification и container integrity для Client, Server, Android и PWA.
Windows updater metadata только для complete signed asset set.
SBOM и release evidence сохраняют проверяемую provenance.
en: Immutable tag and exact source revision.
SHA-256/checksum verification and container integrity for Client, Server, Android and PWA.
Windows updater metadata only for a complete signed asset set.
SBOM and release evidence preserve verifiable provenance.

ru: Создайте verified backup и проверьте free space/source integrity.
Подтвердите schema 8, destination integrity и readability старых данных.
Учитывайте, что old history не шифруется retroactively.
Rollback — restore verified backup, не in-place downgrade.
en: Create a verified backup and check free space/source integrity.
Confirm schema 8, destination integrity and readability of old data.
Remember that old history is not encrypted retroactively.
Rollback restores a verified backup; do not downgrade in place.

text.ru: Между 3.2.0 и 3.3.2 database migration не требуется: schema остаётся 8, API v3/v4 сохраняются. Всё равно обязательны backup, release classification и Client/Server/Trust/Pulse smoke checks.
text.en: No database migration is required between 3.2.0 and 3.3.2: schema remains 8 and API v3/v4 are retained. Backup, release classification and Client/Server/Trust/Pulse smoke checks are still required.

rows.ru: React/Electron, realtime, offline и UX target
rows.en: React/Electron, realtime, offline and UX target

rows.ru: Target Pulse/roadmap requirements, требующие сверки с current main
rows.en: Target Pulse/roadmap requirements requiring verification against current main

text.ru: Комплект датирован 17 июля 2026 года и основан на архиве 0.3.0. Его target tables/endpoints/schema нельзя представлять как реализованные без проверки исходного кода, tests и current repository docs.
text.en: The kit is dated 17 July 2026 and is based on the 0.3.0 archive. Its target tables/endpoints/schema must not be presented as implemented without checking source, tests and current repository docs.

text.ru: Комплект используется для provenance архитектурных решений, исходных risks и эволюции требований; current source остаётся authoritative.
text.en: The kit is used for architectural provenance, original risks and requirement evolution; current source remains authoritative.
